case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JONITKA HEARNE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HEARNE, JONITKA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HEARNE, JONITKA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEARNE, JONITKA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1624 TURK STREET, #302 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDES/APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS/TENANTS**
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-15-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HEARNE, JONITKA
